termsIntro: Please read these Terms and Conditions carefully before using the HabiSpace application. These terms govern your use of our platform and services.
terms1Content: By accessing or using HabiSpace, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree to all of these terms, you may not use our services.
terms2Content:
You agree to use HabiSpace only for lawful purposes and in a manner that does not infringe the rights of others. You must not:

• Post false, misleading, or fraudulent listings
• Impersonate any person or entity
• Collect user information without consent
• Use the service for any illegal activity
• Interfere with the proper working of the app
terms3Content:
You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree to:

• Provide accurate and complete registration information
• Notify us immediately of any unauthorized account use
• Take responsibility for all activities under your account
terms4Content: All property listings on HabiSpace are provided for informational purposes only. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or availability of any listing. Users are encouraged to verify all information before making any decisions.
terms5Content: All content on HabiSpace, including logos, text, graphics, and software, is the property of HabiSpace or its content suppliers and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws.
terms6Content: HabiSpace shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of our services, including but not limited to loss of profits, data, or goodwill.
terms7Content: Our app may contain links to third-party websites or services. We are not responsible for the content or practices of those third parties and encourage you to review their terms and privacy policies.
terms8Content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at any time, without notice, for conduct that we determine violates these Terms or is harmful to other users, us, or third parties.
terms9Content: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Arab Republic of Egypt, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
terms10Content:
For any questions regarding these Terms and Conditions:

📧 legal@habispace.com
📍 Cairo, Egypt
privacy1Content:
We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you create an account, update your profile, or contact us for support. This includes:

• Name, email address, and password
• Profile information such as location and phone number
• Property preferences and search history
• Communications you send to us
privacy2Content:
We use the information we collect to:

• Provide, maintain, and improve our services
• Process transactions and send related information
• Send promotional communications (with your consent)
• Respond to comments and questions
• Monitor and analyze usage patterns
privacy3Content:
We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share your information in the following circumstances:

• With service providers who assist in our operations
• When required by law or to protect our rights
• In connection with a merger or acquisition
• With your consent
privacy4Content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.
privacy5Content:
You have the right to:

• Access the personal data we hold about you
• Request correction of inaccurate data
• Request deletion of your personal data
• Opt-out of marketing communications
• Lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority
privacy6Content: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track activity on our app and hold certain information. You can instruct your device to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent.
privacy7Content: Our service is not directed to individuals under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you become aware that a child has provided us with personal information, please contact us.
privacy8Content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the 'Last Updated' date.
privacy9Content:
If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

📧 privacy@habispace.com
📍 Cairo, Egypt
changePasswordInfo: Your new password must be at least 8 characters and include an uppercase letter and a number.
